description: AI daily news collection, drafting, and SMTP delivery workflow pack
notes: News generation requires network access to the configured upstream news sources.
SMTP delivery requires the mailbox provider to have SMTP enabled before execution.
If the provider requires an app password or authorization code, it must already be provisioned outside the registry.
The executing agent must verify SMTP_SERVER SMTP_PORT SMTP_USERNAME and SMTP_PASSWORD are present before attempting delivery.
If the host requires a proxy or IPv4-only routing, the SMTP proxy or IPv4 environment variables must be set before execution.
